hero.text: Your time is limited, don't waste it living someone else's life.
hero.author: Steve Jobs

aries.general: Today is a great day to focus on personal relationships, Aries. You may find unexpected support from friends.
aries.love: Your emotions are heightened; express love openly.
aries.career: Opportunities at work will arise, be ready to seize them.

taurus.general: Patience is key today, Taurus. Keep a steady pace and don’t rush things.
taurus.love: Talks with your partner will deepen your understanding of each other.
taurus.career: Persistence in your work will be rewarded.

gemini.general: Communication will be your strongest asset today, Gemini. Use it wisely.
gemini.love: Flirtation and charm bring exciting prospects.
gemini.career: Collaboration with colleagues will lead to innovative ideas.

cancer.general: Today is about nurturing yourself and others, Cancer. Seek emotional connections.
cancer.love: Romantic gestures will enhance your relationship.
cancer.career: Focus on teamwork now; it will pay off later.

leo.general: Your creativity shines today, Leo. Use it to solve problems and inspire others.
leo.love: Spontaneity in love will create memorable moments.
leo.career: Take initiative; your leadership skills are needed.

virgo.general: Details matter today, Virgo. Pay attention to small tasks to ensure success.
virgo.love: Clear communication will strengthen your bond.
virgo.career: Organize your workspace for better productivity.

libra.general: Balance is essential, Libra. Seek harmony in all areas of life.
libra.love: A peaceful resolution to conflicts is possible today.
libra.career: Networking can open new doors; engage with others.

scorpio.general: Your intuition is heightened today, Scorpio. Trust your gut feelings.
scorpio.love: Intensity in your emotions can lead to passionate encounters.
scorpio.career: Financial matters may need your careful attention.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls you today, Sagittarius. Embrace new experiences.
sagittarius.love: A new romance may be on the horizon.
sagittarius.career: Innovative ideas at work will be embraced.

capricorn.general: Discipline and hard work will pay off today, Capricorn.
capricorn.love: Trust and loyalty are important themes; communicate openly.
capricorn.career: Mentorship may help guide your career path.

aquarius.general: Today provides a chance for self-reflection and personal growth, Aquarius.
aquarius.love: Show your unique self to your partner; authenticity is attractive.
aquarius.career: Look for innovative solutions to ongoing challenges.

pisces.general: Your creativity and imagination will flourish today, Pisces. Express yourself.
pisces.love: Artistic activities with a partner rekindle romance.
pisces.career: Follow your creative instincts; they will lead to success.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
professional.author: Theodore Roosevelt

professional.text: Nothing in the world can take the place of persistence.
professional.author: Calvin Coolidge

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Live for today, plan for tomorrow.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Stay positive, work hard, make it happen.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Do it with passion or not at all.
captions.author: Rosa Nouchette Carey

captions.text: Success is not just about what you accomplish in your life, it's about what you inspire others to do.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
captions.author: Christian D. Larson

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: We are stuck with technology when what we really want is just stuff that works.
tech.author: Douglas Adams

tech.text: The Internet is becoming the town square for the global village of tomorrow.
tech.author: Bill Gates

fun.text: You may say I'm a dreamer, but I'm not the only one.
fun.author: John Lennon

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: For we walk by faith, not by sight.
faith.author: 2 Corinthians 5:7

faith.text: Faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.
faith.author: Hebrews 11:1

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you'd have preferred to talk.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain

wisdom.text: The invariable mark of wisdom is to see the miraculous in the common.
wisdom.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
